title: pelargonium × melissimum
intro: Pelargonium × melissimum, also known as Melissa Officinalis or Lemon Balm, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × melissimum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and soothing digestive issues, as well as having antimicrobial properties to fight against infections. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × melissimum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, or simply enjoyed as a calming and refreshing beverage.
